title: Dashboard Screen — Account Balances
objective: Build the DashboardScreen with DashboardViewModel showing all accounts with reactive balances and total wealth using Material 3 design (spacious layout, large typography).
execution_steps: Create DashboardViewModel (Hilt-injected): collect GetAccountBalancesUseCase Flow, expose UiState with list of AccountWithBalance and totalWealth
Build DashboardScreen with Material 3 Cards — one card per account showing name, type icon, and balance
Show total wealth prominently at the top
Add empty state prompt when no accounts exist
Wire DashboardScreen to the NavGraph dashboard route
Write ViewModel unit test: verify totalWealth sums correctly, verify empty state
Manual check: open app, observe accounts with spacious modern layout
definition_of_done: DashboardScreen renders all accounts reactively without manual refresh
Total wealth = sum of all account balances
Empty state shown when no accounts
